「Redacted」
Works Performances Press About Contact

「Some Land of Redemption」

Some Land of Redemption is not a home, it is not a haunting, it is a culmination of dreams unfulfilled. Echos of the self hum with pleasure, loneliness, and dependency within the doll house. They are singing an origin story at the end of the world.

Choreographed and Directed by: Mimi Doan and Cole Stapleton

Performed by: Sage Horsey, Cayleen Del Rosario, Demetris Charalambous, Cole Stapleton, Mimi Doan

Music by: Slic

Costumes by: Joohee Park

Run Time: 45 minutes
